title: loncomelos pyrenaicum subsp. sphaerocarpum
intro: Loncomelos pyrenaicum subsp. sphaerocarpum, also known as the Pyrenean loncomelos, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain furanocoumarins and other bioactive compounds. The seeds of Loncomelos pyrenaicum subsp. sphaerocarpum have been reported to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, offering potential health benefits such as protection against cell damage, improved immune function, and reduced risk of chronic diseases. Herbal preparations of the plant, including decoctions and infusions, have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
